name: Savory Potato Quiche
recipeIngredient: 2 large potatoes, baked & cut into thin slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a heavy skillet over low heat.
2. Add the potato slices and saute until coated with butter and slightly browned.
3. Dust each potato slice on both sides with about 3 tablespoons of grated cheese, using a light hand.
4. Arrange the slices in the pastry shell.
5. Lightly beat the eggs with a wire whisk.
6. Add the half and half and seasoning; blend until smooth.
7. Place the pastry shell on a cookie sheet.
8. Carefully pour the custard mixture into the pastry shell.
9. Sprinkle with the remaining grated cheese.
10. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees.
11. Bake on the center shelf for 30 minutes, or until puffy and brown.
12. Let sit for 5-10 minutes before serving.
Note: Recipe from "One Million Recipes CD" busted by Judy R.
